aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
Several new device requests have been identified in the GitHub issues:

1. **Climate Sensor Model TS0201**
   - **ID**: _TZ3000_tsgqxdb4
   - **User**: Snacker80
   - **Drivers**: climate_sensor
   - **Issue Link**: [#183](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/183)

2. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Manufacturer**: Shenzen New Green Energy Technologies Co. Ltd
   - **ID**: _TZE284_8se38w3c (TS0601)
   - **User**: pemikalsen-sudo
   - **Drivers**: climate_sensor
   - **Issue Link**: [#184](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/184)

3. **Bseed E-touch Series Zigbee 1-Gang**
   - **ID**: _TZ3002_jn2x20tg
   - **User**: vbesteiro
   - **Drivers**: switch_1gang
   - **Issue Link**: [#171](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/171)

4. **MiBoxer Zigbee 3.9 Remote**
   - **ID**: _TZ3000_xwh1e22x
   - **User**: gangstigen-glitch
   - **Drivers**: bulb_rgbw
   - **Issue Link**: [#1361](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1361)

5. **Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control**
   - **ID**: _TZE284_ne4pikwm (TS0601)
   - **User**: gitebk
   - **Drivers**: climate_sensor
   - **Issue Link**: [#1360](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1360)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
The following fingerprints are already supported in the repository:

- **_TZ3000_tsgqxdb4**: Supported as a climate sensor.
- **_TZE284_8se38w3c**: Supported as a climate sensor.
- **_TZ3002_jn2x20tg**: Supported as a switch_1gang.
- **_TZ3000_xwh1e22x**: Supported as a bulb_rgbw.
- **_TZE284_ne4pikwm**: Supported as a climate sensor.

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
Currently, there are no new fingerprints from forks identified for integration.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
Several pull requests (PRs) have been submitted that may contain useful changes:

1. **Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices**
   - **PR #180** by Robsta86
   - **Status**: Closed
   - **Link**: [PR #180](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)

2. **Added TS110E driver**
   - **PR #1350** by PiTRiS87
   - **Status**: Open
   - **Link**: [PR #1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)

3. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**
   - **PR #1166** by chernals
   - **Status**: Closed
   - **Link**: [PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

4. **Added 3 new devices**
   - **PR #1253** by Peter-Celica
   - **Status**: Open
   - **Link**: [PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

5. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1219** by Melectro1
   - **Status**: Open
   - **Link**: [PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

6. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1218** by Melectro1
   - **Status**: Open
   - **Link**: [PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

7. **Add _TZE204_bjzrowv2 - Update app.json**
   - **PR #1195** by YuriEstevan
   - **Status**: Open
   - **Link**: [PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing support, and ongoing contributions.
